cost.human_maintenance: component-state CSS matrix + two grade() undo-window rewrites + run error handling + audit tool + Node behavioural test + browser test + verifier + adversarial review

value.acceptance: PASS (verifier re-derives; Node behavioural test proves undo writes nothing; in-app browser proves theme switch preserves scroll/answers/filters/expand across all six themes)
value.user_value: every click gets instant visual feedback (pressed/loading/disabled/success/error); a mis-clicked recall grade can be undone within 4s with NO data written; switching among the six themes never loses the user's reading position, revealed answers, typed filters, or expanded sections
value.realized_on_deploy: lands when the fixed worker (40a46aa2baee) deploys; committed to source now (NOT_DEPLOYED), live still b189d3cc0703

unknown_not_zero: real per-device interaction timing on phones is unknown until deploy; the deferred-write undo window trades a 4s write delay (grade lost if the tab is closed mid-window) for zero-write undo (disclosed in known_gaps).
